messages.content: Write grreting message for LinkedIn for getting friend  in 200 simbols for greeting HR director in BASF who worked previously in ruussia and now in spain

"Hello! It's a pleasure connecting with you here. I hope this message finds you well. I noticed your impressive background as an HR Director in BASF, previously in Russia and now in Spain. I'd love to connect and learn from your wealth of experience. Let's connect!🙂"
